preamble.title: team/lazer-perps
preamble.description: Perpetual futures protocol powered by Pyth Lazer price feeds on Cardano

lazer_perps/types/MarketConfig.title: MarketConfig
lazer_perps/types/MarketConfig.description:
Per-market configuration — applied as parameter at deployment.
 Deploy once per market: XAU 10x, XAG 10x, XTI 5x, etc.

fields.title: pyth_id
fields.description: Pyth deployment policy ID on Cardano

fields.title: feed_id
fields.description: Pyth Lazer feed ID for this market (e.g. 346 = XAU/USD)

fields.title: min_collateral
fields.description: Minimum collateral in lovelace to open a position

fields.title: pool_policy_id
fields.description: Policy ID of the liquidity pool manager

lazer_perps/types/PoolState.title: PoolState
lazer_perps/types/PoolState.description: Pool state stored as datum on the liquidity pool eUTxO

fields.title: total_open_interest
fields.description: Total open interest across all positions (lovelace)

lazer_perps/types/Position.title: Position
lazer_perps/types/Position.description: A perpetual position stored as datum on an independent eUTxO

anyOf.title: Withdraw
anyOf.description: Withdraw liquidity from the pool (only if OI allows)

anyOf.title: PositionOpened
anyOf.description: Update pool state after position open (increase OI)

anyOf.title: PositionClosed
anyOf.description: Update pool state after position close (decrease OI, settle PnL)

anyOf.title: PositionLiquidated
anyOf.description: Update pool state after liquidation (decrease OI, collect remaining)
